title: Herobrine Mode
description: Play as Herobrine and explore a cursed world
body:
# Herobrine Mode
**Experience the perspective from Herobrine and immerse yourself in a spooky world They start when you enter a world at night and no longer during the day as before. Creepers will now burn during the day**
# Herobrine Moon And Sun
![Herobrine Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/862d9e03f6d4fe2cd34d9358914d49fcda8c5b83_0.webp)

**With the mod the moon and the sun have a different look. The full moon has a special texture as you can see in the picture**

# New Biomes
![Blood Ocean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e816af6ebb78c3518414b7cb29f177d785e317bf_0.webp)

**Explore many new biomes most are forests but there are also new cave biomes**

# New Mobs
![Steve](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87adb22a4d5ca02f1a066aa359c2750cb79afea4.png)

**Meet new mobs including Steve Notch Frendly Spieder and other mobs. Some will run away from you and others will fight against you**

# New Structures
![steves house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35a0aafabcedde461df1a817169e636a64b5fa01.png)

**On your world you can also encounter new structures. Steve's House. In this structure you can find new items**
